# Portfolio Creative - Video Editor Portfolio

Next.js 14 App Router project with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion for a premium video editor portfolio.

## Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- React

## Status
✅ Project fully created with enhanced cinematic effects

## Cinematic Features
- **Film grain** animation overlay
- **Vignette effect** for dramatic depth
- **Animated scan lines** on hero section
- **Parallax floating elements** with multi-layer depth
- **Custom cursor** with trailing glow effect
- **Shimmer text gradient** animations
- **Dramatic hover effects** with 3D transforms
- **Slower, deliberate transitions** (1s+ durations)
- **Enhanced glow effects** with multiple shadow layers
- **Cinematic page wipe transitions**

## Project Structure
- `/app` - All pages (Home, Work, About, Contact, Client pages)
- `/components` - Reusable components (Navigation, Footer, VideoCard, etc.)
- `/lib` - Data and utilities (projects.ts)
- Tailwind config with custom colors, gradients, and animations
- Framer Motion for smooth page transitions and micro-interactions

## Customization Notes
- Update project data in `lib/projects.ts`
- Customize colors in `tailwind.config.ts`
- Update social links in `components/Footer.tsx` and `app/contact/page.tsx`
- Add video URLs and thumbnails to projects
- Configure contact form integration if needed
